[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00001000 1
2 01110101 5
3 01000000 1
4 11111111 a
5 00000111 3
6 00000100 1
7 11001100 4

01 10 01000000 1 match 3
12 21 01000000 1 match 3
23 32 00000111 3 match 5
34 43 00000100 1 match 6
45 54 00000100 1 match 6
56 65 01001100 3 match 0
67 76 00001000 1 match 1
70 07 00010000 1

13 31 00000000 a

35 53 00000100 1 match 6
46 64 00000100 1 match 6
57 75 00001000 1 match 1

71 17 00000000 a

61 16 01000000 1 match 3
72 27 00011010 3
